_doc: juliet-c-cpp — strict GT not yet curated. The C/C++ Juliet test suite emits ~87k findings across thousands of CWE-organized test files; auto-curating each line-level is impractical without a Juliet-style GT builder (like buildJulietExpected exists for Java). Marked as wildcards-only until a proper builder is added. This is the only one of 33 real-world benchmarks where strict-label F1 is not measurable without further engineering — see STRICT-F1-BASELINE.md roadmap.
